title: SG MRT style PIDS v1.01 Public Ver [MTR4]
description: A Singapore MRT-inspired PIDS custom presets for the Joban Client Mod, and Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.
body:
**A Singapore MRT-inspired PIDS custom presets for the Joban Client Mod, and Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.**

Thanks for downloading my Singapore MRT-inspired PIDS resource pack! Feel free to contact me for more details/improvement! Appreciate it :) A README file can be found in the file.

[AS OF 17th Sept 2025: This Resource Pack will not receive future updates as I move on to [V2](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sg-mrt-pids-v2)]

![PIDS inspired from the real life North-East Line (NEL)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb0725f653e89d42d3329a3be2b6558be2b5c66b.png)

CONTENT:
=========================
PIDS based on the real life Singapore MRT Lines: Circle, Downtown, East-West, North-East, North-South, and Thomson-East Coast.

CREDITS:
=========================
Special thanks to "[MTR style PIDS](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Z6fKTFZn-JmJ2wsGw1KxZ0w25SsT-GdF/view)" by [SungSteam583747](https://discord.com/channels/763273460465270816/953329579567767572/1111305593228107907) [Discord linked message], for the original template.
Mod-ed and re-created the PIDS by me, AbsurdlySmrt.

REQUIRED MINECRAFT MOD:
=========================
This Resource Pack **requires** the following:

[**Joban Client Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jcm)

[**Minecraft Transit Railway**](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway)

UTILISATION IN-GAME:
=========================
With the [**Joban Client Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jcm), head over to one of the desired PIDS Railway Vision.

Under "PIDS Preset", hover down to the "Custom Preset" segment and the custom presets can be found there.

For a quick visual walkthrough guide:
